name: Mal0 Transformation
description:
While you were working your 9-to-5 shift, you receive a message on your phone about a mysterious app that just downloaded itself.

Basically, I was really horny, and this came out. It took me SIX. DAMN. HOURS. to write Mal0's physical description because I'm a disgusting perfectionist, and nothing convinced me. Several hours of watching porn later, I finally reached a result that satisfies me.

You can do whatever you want—you are Mal0, but you're visible to everyone. You have some control over electronic devices, and your ass is so big that no pants on the planet can contain it. Personally, I ended up marrying a famous actor and becoming his slut, but you can do whatever you want.

I want to make more bots like this. I have three ideas: Bowsette, Lady Dimitrescu, Chun li, and Haydee. If inspiration or energy hits me, I'll do one of the three, probably Lady D or Haydee, since I already have part of Lady D's description done, and Haydee /Chun li have a very simple design, so it would take me little time to make them. Anyway, here are more images of Mal0 NOW with credits.
